name: 7 Days Awake
short_description: 7 Days Awake is a psychological horror game. Locked in a room with no way out, use your deductive reasoning to find the weakness of the monsters attacking you day and night to kill you. The only way out of this hell is to pass the test: will you survive 7 days without sleep?
detailed_description:
General Description
You wake up in a dark, cold room. A stranger explains the situation: she has captured you to test your intelligence. If you survive seven days without sleep, she will let you go. But these seven days will be anything but restful: this psychopath lets her "Creations" roam the corridors leading to the testing chamber where you are trapped. Each Creation is a danger to your life, but they also each have a specific weakness. Use your deductive reasoning to find them and thus stay alive for the entire test.

Will you manage to survive this test?

Game

You can only move your head: look at the four walls surrounding you and the ceiling.

In this small room, other elements will be useful to you throughout these nights.

Doors will open onto "Creations."

Perform the action you deduced to survive the attack.

Stay alive until the break time.

Try again.

And get out of here in one piece.

Personal note

I hope you enjoy my very first Steam game!
